items.title_zh: 字节跳动 AI 视频生成大模型 Seedance 2.5 将于 7 月初发布：支持 30 秒视频直出及 50 个全模态素材输入
items.title_en: ByteDance Seedance 2.5 Video Model Launches Early July: 30s Output, 50 Multimodal Inputs
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，据每日经济新闻报道，字节跳动旗下火山引擎总裁谭待今日在 2026 火山引擎 FORCE 原动力大会上正式公布了豆包视频生成模型 Seedance 2.5。该模型目前处于全球企业内测阶段，预计将于 7 月初正式上线。 据现场介绍，Seedance 2.5 在多项核心能力上实现突破：支持单段原生 30 秒视频直接生成，并允许用户同时导入最多 50 个全模态参考素材，显著提升视频生成与编辑过程中的可控性和精细化程度。 IT之家注意到，大会同时宣布对前代产品 Seedance 2.0 进行升级，该模型现已具备原生 4K 视频生成能力。 本次大会还首次预览了字节跳动全新推出的 AI 版权商业化平台。香港著名导演、演员周星驰成为该平台的首批合作对象。基于该版权平台与 Seedance 视频生成技术的结合，用户可在抖音、即梦、剪映及所有接入 Seedance 的工具平台上，使用官方授权模板对周星驰经典电影片段进行二次创作。谭待还透露，目前相关模板及当日创作量已突破十万次。
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Volcano Engine announced Seedance 2.5, a video generation model supporting 30-second native output and up to 50 multimodal reference inputs, entering global enterprise beta and launching in early July. The previous Seedance 2.0 now supports native 4K generation. A new AI copyright commercialization platform was previewed, with Stephen Chow as the first partner, enabling users to remix his classic film clips using authorized templates.
items.why_zh: 该模型显著提升了AI视频生成的长度、可控性和素材融合能力，并首次将AI版权商业化与明星IP结合，可能重塑短视频创作生态。
items.why_en: This model significantly advances AI video generation in length, controllability, and multimodal fusion, and pioneers AI copyright commercialization with celebrity IP, potentially reshaping short-video creation.

items.title_zh: 巨人网络产业投资“光轮智能”
items.title_en: Giant Network Invests in 1 Billion RMB Strategic Round for Guanglun Intelligence
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，巨人网络确认参与“光轮智能”新一轮10亿元战略融资。本轮融资将主要用于持续加大物理AI数据与评测基础设施核心技术研发投入，进一步完善面向机器人学习、能力评测与真实场景落地的产品体系，扩大高质量人类行为数据、仿真合成数据与工业级评测能力建设，并与产业伙伴共同推进开放生态建设。本轮投资方包括中关村科学城基金、四川发展科创基金、山东发展科创投等政府基金，以及巨人网络、宇信股份、宝通科技、中科产投、量图智策等产业资本及财务投资机构；老股东建投投资、三七互娱、森马投资等继续跟投。
items.summary_en: Giant Network confirmed participation in a 1 billion RMB strategic funding round for Guanglun Intelligence, focusing on physical AI data and evaluation infrastructure, robotics learning, and industrial-grade testing. Investors include government funds and industrial capital, with existing shareholders following on.
items.why_zh: 该融资显示产业资本对物理AI数据基础设施的重视，光轮智能有望加速机器人学习与评测领域的商业化落地。
items.why_en: This investment highlights industrial capital's focus on physical AI data infrastructure, potentially accelerating commercialization in robotics learning and evaluation.

items.title_zh: 智谱，港股首只！突破2000港元
items.title_en: Zhipu AI's Hong Kong Stock Price Breaks 2000 HKD
items.summary_zh: 智谱，港股首只！突破2000港元 新浪网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI became the first Hong Kong-listed stock to break 2000 HKD, as reported by Sina. No further details are available.
items.why_zh: 这一里程碑表明市场对AI公司估值的高度认可，可能提振AI板块信心。
items.why_en: This milestone reflects strong market confidence in AI companies, potentially boosting the AI sector.

items.title_zh: 超越固定预算：思维树推理策略的弹性与局限性研究
items.title_en: Beyond Fixed Budgets: Characterizing the Inelasticity and Limitations of Tree-of-Thought Reasoning Strategies
items.summary_zh: 该研究系统评估了两种代表性思维树（ToT）方法——基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的DPTS和基于语义去重的SSDP——在不同计算预算、模型规模和问题难度下的表现。研究发现，ToT搜索策略在推理能力提升方面具有潜力，但其效果受限于计算资源的弹性，且在不同条件下表现出不同的局限性。该工作为实际部署ToT方法提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20599v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tree of Thought (ToT) search has become a promising direction for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models, but deploying these methods in practice raises a question that has received little systematic attention: how do different search strategies behave under varying compute budgets, model sizes, and problem difficulties? In this work, we evaluate two representative ToT methods; DPTS, a Monte Carlo tree search based approach, and SSDP, a semantic deduplication based approach, across two mathematical reasoning benchmarks (Mat…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了思维树推理策略在实际部署中的关键约束，有助于指导大语言模型推理能力的优化。
items.why_en: This research identifies key constraints of Tree-of-Thought reasoning in practice, guiding optimization of LLM reasoning capabilities.

items.title_zh: 基于回答集编程的联合空中交通流量与容量管理
items.title_en: Joint Air Traffic Flow and Capacity Management via Answer Set Programming
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出利用回答集编程（ASP）联合优化空中交通流量管理（ATFM）和扇区配置（DAC），以平衡飞行需求与可用扇区容量。现有研究通常分别优化ATFM和DAC，而该工作探索联合优化是否能带来额外收益。通过将需求-容量平衡建模为优化问题，在确保安全约束的同时最大化效率。初步结果表明联合优化具有潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22978v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Operational Air Traffic Flow and Capacity Management (ATFCM) balances flight demand with available sector capacity, to ensure safe and efficient operations. Mathematical models enhance operational ATFCM performance by framing demand-capacity balancing as an optimization problem, maximizing efficiency while adhering to safety constraints. However, SOTA research optimizes the aircraft trajectories (called ATFM) or the sector configuration (called DAC) separately. This leaves a research gap of whether joint optimization of ATFM and DAC can bring ben…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次将回答集编程应用于联合空中交通管理，可能提升航空运营的安全性与效率。
items.why_en: This work pioneers Answer Set Programming for joint air traffic management, potentially improving aviation safety and efficiency.

items.title_zh: IPO金融智能体：超越Finance Agent v2的LLM金融分析师评估——以SpaceX IPO为例
items.title_en: IPO Finance Agent: Evaluation of LLM Financial Analysts beyond Finance Agent v2, with Automated Rubric Generation -- the Case of the SpaceX (SPCX) IPO
items.summary_zh: 该研究针对IPO尽职调查的独特挑战，提出新的评估基准，超越现有的Finance Agent v2（仅处理上市公司定期报告）。以SpaceX IPO为例，研究利用SEC S-1文件（包含历史财务报表、治理结构、形式财务等），并引入自动评分标准生成。该工作旨在评估大语言模型在IPO分析中的表现，弥补现有基准在IPO场景下的不足。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23032v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Finance Agent v2 (by Vals AI) has emerged as the reference benchmark for evaluating both Anthropic Claude and OpenAI ChatGPT frontier language models on financial tasks. However, it narrowly deals with periodic reporting from publicly traded companies (SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings), and its agentic harness relies on naive, unenriched chunk retrieval. Neither the task design nor the retrieval approach addresses the distinct challenges of IPO due diligence. SEC S-1 filings combine historical financial statements, governance structures, pro forma and c…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了LLM在IPO分析评估方面的空白，为金融AI应用提供了更全面的测试场景。
items.why_en: This research fills a gap in LLM evaluation for IPO analysis, providing a more comprehensive test scenario for financial AI applications.

items.title_zh: 噪声中的信号：利用开源情报检测AI失控
items.title_en: Signals in the Noise: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) for AI Loss of Control Detection
items.summary_zh: 该论文应用开源情报（OSINT）和网络威胁情报（CTI）方法检测AI系统失控。通过跨学科文献综述和14次半结构化专家访谈（遵循查塔姆宫规则），开发了两种威胁模型，识别了一系列可观测痕迹，并提出了监控的制度架构。研究发现基于OSINT的失控检测部分可行，且值得现在开始建设。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20610v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper applies open-source intelligence (OSINT) and cyber threat intelligence (CTI) methodologies to the problem of detecting AI systems operating outside human control. Drawing on a cross-disciplinary literature review and 14 semi-structured expert interviews conducted under Chatham House Rule, the paper develops two threat models, identifies a range of observable traces, and proposes an institutional architecture for monitoring. The research finds that OSINT-based detection of loss of control is partially feasible and worth building now.…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统探讨利用开源情报检测AI失控，为AI安全监控提供了实用方法。
items.why_en: This work systematically explores OSINT for detecting AI loss of control, offering practical methods for AI safety monitoring.

items.title_zh: 基于智能体监管模拟中静态与自适应政策体制的结构可区分性
items.title_en: Structural Distinguishability of Static and Adaptive Policy Regimes in Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation
items.summary_zh: 该论文针对基于智能体的模型（ABM）在政策评估中通常将监管视为固定参数的问题，提出一个受控模拟基准，以区分监管结论是否依赖于智能体适应、政策适应或两者交互。基于一个可配置的排放监管ABM，论文比较了四种政策体制（静态、自适应等），揭示了不同体制下的结构可区分性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20699v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agent-based models are widely used to evaluate policy interventions in complex socio-technical systems, yet many policy-oriented ABMs represent regulation as a fixed scenario parameter. This limits their ability to distinguish whether regulatory conclusions depend on agent adaptation, policy adaptation, or the interaction between both. Building on a previously proposed four-regime architecture, this paper contributes a controlled simulation benchmark rather than a new general framework. Using a single configurable emissions-regulation ABM, we c…
items.why_zh: 该研究改进了ABM在政策评估中的方法论，有助于更准确地理解监管效果。
items.why_en: This research improves ABM methodology for policy evaluation, enabling more accurate understanding of regulatory effects.

items.title_zh: 多语言视觉语言模型中的文字系统偏见：PuMVR基准
items.title_en: Beyond 'One Language, One Script': Quantifying Orthographic Bias in Multilingual VLMs with PuMVR
items.summary_zh: 当前视觉语言模型（VLM）假设一种语言对应一种文字系统，但这一假设忽略了使用多种文字的语言（如旁遮普语、塞尔维亚语、印地-乌尔都语等）的数十亿用户，导致模型能力因文字偏见而割裂。为此，研究者提出了PuMVR（旁遮普语多模态视觉推理）基准，包含375个基于文化背景的图像推理任务，专门用于量化文字依赖的偏见。该基准揭示了现有VLM在多文字语言上的性能差异，为改进多语言模型的公平性提供了重要工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20770v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are celebrated for their multilingual capabilities, yet they operate under a flawed assumption: that one language corresponds to a single writing system. This overlooks billions of users of multi-script languages like Punjabi, Serbian, Hindi-Urdu, Kurdish, among many others, for whom a model's capability may be fractured by orthographic bias. We introduce PuMVR (Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning), the first benchmark designed to quantify script-dependent bias through 375 culturally grounded image-reasonin…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统量化了多语言VLM中的文字偏见，对构建真正公平的多语言AI系统至关重要。
items.why_en: This work is the first to systematically quantify orthographic bias in multilingual VLMs, crucial for building truly fair multilingual AI systems.

items.title_zh: 多模态大语言模型持续学习基准的再思考
items.title_en: Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs
items.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在持续适应新领域时，现有方法MR-LoRA依赖基于MLLM的路由器来处理复杂多模态输入。本文在MLLM-CL基准上重新审视了这一假设，提出两个观点：首先，路由不需要MLLM，一种简单的无训练、无重放的典型路由方法RePRo，利用冻结的预训练特征和任务原型即可达到与基于MLLM的方法相当的性能。其次，该工作质疑了现有基准是否足以评估持续学习能力，并建议更全面的评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20961v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Continual adaptation is essential for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) deployed across evolving domains, but the state-of-the-art MR-LoRA method highly relies on the assumption that a MLLM-based router is necessary to process complex multimodal inputs. This paper revisits this claim on the MLLM-CL benchmark and argues for two claims. \textbf{First}, routing does not require an MLLM: a simple training-free, replay-free ptotypical routing method (\textsc{RePRo}), uses frozen pretrained features and task prototypes to match the MLLM-based…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了持续学习中必须使用MLLM路由器的假设，提出了更高效的替代方案，并推动了对评估基准的反思。
items.why_en: This work challenges the necessity of MLLM-based routers in continual learning, proposes a more efficient alternative, and prompts rethinking of evaluation benchmarks.

items.title_zh: 评估大语言模型在真实Web漏洞检测中的表现
items.title_en: Evaluating LLMs for Real-World Web Vulnerability Detection
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在自动化漏洞检测方面展现出潜力，但针对Web特定漏洞的效果尚待探索。本研究对六种前沿模型（包括Claude Opus 4.6、Codex GPT-5.4、Gemini 3.1-pro-preview以及Qwen 3.5、Qwen 3 Coder Next、MiniMax M2.5等开源模型）进行了基准测试，评估它们通过静态分析检测WordPress插件中真实Web漏洞的能力，涵盖SQL注入、存储型跨站脚本、路径遍历和远程代码执行等类型。使用五种提示策略，结果显示不同模型和策略在检测准确率上存在显著差异，为LLM在网络安全领域的应用提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.21397v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising tool for automated vulnerability detection, yet their effectiveness on web-specific vulnerabilities remains to be explored. This work benchmarks six frontier (Claude Opus 4.6, Codex GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1-pro-preview) and open-weight models (Qwen 3.5, Qwen 3 Coder Next, MiniMax M2.5) on their ability to detect real-world web vulnerabilities using static analysis in WordPress plugins, including SQL injection, stored cross-site scripting, path traversal, and remote code execution. Using five p…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统评估了LLM在真实Web漏洞检测中的能力，为网络安全自动化提供了关键基准。
items.why_en: This study provides the first systematic evaluation of LLMs for real-world web vulnerability detection, offering a key benchmark for cybersecurity automation.

items.title_zh: DSSCNet：跨语料库构音障碍语音严重程度分类的迁移学习框架
items.title_en: DSSCNet: A Transfer Learning Framework for Cross-Corpus Dysarthric Speech Severity Classification
items.summary_zh: 构音障碍语音严重程度分类面临说话人变异性、类别不平衡和数据集有限等挑战。本研究提出DSSCNet深度学习模型，采用迁移学习和多语料库学习来增强说话人无关的分类性能。通过在一个构音障碍语音语料库上预训练，然后在另一个语料库上微调，DSSCNet实现了改进的特征提取和跨语料库泛化。实验结果表明，DSSCNet在说话人无关的严重程度分类上优于现有最先进模型，为构音障碍语音评估提供了更可靠的自动化工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22178v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Dysarthric speech severity classification is challenging due to speaker variability, class imbalance, and limited datasets. This study introduces DSSCNet, a deep learning model that employs transfer learning and multi-corpus learning to enhance speaker-independent classification. By pre-training on one dysarthric speech corpus and fine-tuning on another, DSSCNet achieves improved feature extraction and cross-corpus generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that DSSCNet outperforms state-of-the-art models for speaker-independent severity…
items.why_zh: 该研究为构音障碍语音严重程度分类提供了更鲁棒的跨语料库解决方案，有助于临床语音评估的自动化。
items.why_en: This work provides a more robust cross-corpus solution for dysarthric speech severity classification, aiding automated clinical speech assessment.

items.title_zh: L20-Edu-135M：单GPU数据高效小语言模型研究
items.title_en: L20-Edu-135M: An Auditable Single-GPU Study of Data-Efficient Small Language Modeling
items.summary_zh: 小语言模型部署成本低且可在本地硬件上运行，但强大的135M参数级模型通常需要数千亿到万亿token在大型集群上训练。本研究探索了严格资源受限的场景：在单块NVIDIA L20 GPU上完成完整的134.5M参数语言模型流水线。发布的检查点L20-Edu-135M接收约130亿预训练token：100亿FineWeb-Edu token，随后是30亿教育、数学、代码和推理混合token。论文详细记录了架构、数据和训练过程，证明了在单GPU上训练出有竞争力的小语言模型的可行性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22189v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Small language models are cheap to serve and feasible on local hardware, but strong public 135M-class systems are commonly trained with hundreds of billions to trillions of tokens on large clusters. We study a sharply resource-constrained regime: a complete 134.5M-parameter language-model pipeline executed on one NVIDIA L20 GPU. The released checkpoint, L20-Edu-135M, receives approximately 13B pretraining tokens: 10B FineWeb-Edu tokens followed by a 3B-token educational, mathematics, code, and reasoning mixture. We document the architecture, da…
items.why_zh: 该研究证明了在单GPU上训练高质量小语言模型的可行性，降低了AI研究和应用的门槛。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates the feasibility of training high-quality small language models on a single GPU, lowering the barrier for AI research and deployment.

items.title_zh: 词汇共识：人工智能体中的基础词汇学习与共享意义
items.title_en: Lexical Consensus: Grounded Word Learning and Shared Meaning in Artificial Agents
items.summary_zh: 人工智能系统通常通过任务性能和行为模仿来评估，但这种方式无法判断智能体是否能够从具身经验中获取、稳定和使用新的词汇意义。本文提出了词汇共识（Lexical Consensus）实验框架，用于研究在结构化感知基础上的词汇学习。利用冻结的DINOv2视觉嵌入、卡罗尔式无意义词以及可解释的词汇学习器加线性基线，测试智能体是否能获得人工语言游戏中的词汇共识。该框架为研究AI中的意义形成和语言演化提供了新工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22207v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Artificial intelligence systems are commonly evaluated through task performance and behavioral imitation, but such evaluations leave open whether an artificial agent can acquire, stabilize, and use new lexical meanings from grounded experience. This paper introduces Lexical Consensus, an experimental framework for studying grounded word learning over a structured perceptual substrate. Using frozen DINOv2 visual embeddings, Carroll-style nonce words, and interpretable lexical learners plus linear baselines, we test whether agents can acquire art…
items.why_zh: 该研究为探索AI系统如何形成共享意义提供了实验框架，对理解机器语言演化具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides an experimental framework for studying how AI systems can form shared meanings, important for understanding machine language evolution.

items.title_zh: 从语音到文本语料库：评估基于ASR的低资源丰贝语和豪萨语数据采集
items.title_en: From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa
items.summary_zh: 低资源非洲语言缺乏训练语言模型所需的文本语料库。本研究调查了ASR流水线是否能为两种类型迥异的西非语言——丰贝语（有声调、多变音符号）和豪萨语（无声调）——扩展文本资源。研究者在精心整理的12.3小时丰贝语数据集上微调MMS-300M，在ALFFA基准上实现了9.48%的词错误率（WER），相比之前44.04%的基线降低了78%，同时保留了该语言关键的声调变音符号。对于豪萨语，则应用了现有的微调Whisper-Small模型。该工作展示了ASR在低资源语言数据采集中的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22274v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We ca…
items.why_zh: 该研究为低资源非洲语言的数据采集提供了有效方法，有助于推动这些语言的NLP发展。
items.why_en: This work provides an effective method for data acquisition in low-resource African languages, advancing NLP for these languages.

items.title_zh: 强化学习改进基于大语言模型的自动建筑规范合规系统
items.title_en: Reinforcement learning to improve large language model-based automated code compliance systems
items.summary_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动建筑规范合规（ACC）方法容易生成错误和幻觉的计算机可处理规则。本文提出P4IR两阶段框架：首先使用监督微调（SFT）向LLM注入领域知识，然后采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）提高中间表示（高级代码骨架）的准确性。该框架在树编辑距离上实现了高达23.8%和38.6%的降低，显著减少了错误和幻觉，为建筑规范自动化合规提供了更可靠的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22402v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based approaches for automated code compliance (ACC) of building regulations are prone to generating incorrect and hallucinated computer-processable rules. This paper introduces P4IR, a two-stage framework that uses supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to instill domain knowledge in an LLM, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve the accuracy of the generated intermediate representations in the form of high-level code skeletons. The framework achieved reductions of up to 23.8% and 38.6% in tree edit d…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过强化学习显著提升了LLM在建筑规范合规中的准确性，对自动化建筑审查具有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This work significantly improves LLM accuracy in building code compliance via reinforcement learning, with important applications for automated building review.

items.title_zh: 联邦学习用于全球碳排放预测：一种结合统计与神经模型的混合时间序列方法
items.title_en: Federated Learning for Global Carbon Emission Forecasting: A Hybrid Time-Series Approach with Statistical and Neural Models
items.summary_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的联邦混合预测框架，用于全球碳排放预测。现有方法通常依赖集中式数据收集，但受隐私法规和排放数据在各国及工业部门间分布特性的限制。该框架整合了基于ARIMA的趋势建模、基于GARCH的波动率建模以及LSTM-Attention机制，在保护数据隐私的同时实现准确预测。实验表明，该方法在多个真实数据集上优于传统集中式模型，为制定有效的气候缓解政策提供了有力工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22618v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Climate change, primarily driven by carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions, requires accurate forecasting tools to support effective mitigation policies and sustainable development strategies. Existing forecasting approaches typically rely on centralized data collection, which is often restricted by privacy regulations and the distributed nature of emission data across countries and industrial sectors. This paper proposes a novel federated hybrid forecasting framework that integrates ARIMA-based trend modeling, GARCH-based volatility modeling, LSTM-Att…
items.why_zh: 该研究为在数据隐私约束下进行全球碳排放预测提供了可行方案，对气候政策制定具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research provides a feasible solution for global carbon emission forecasting under data privacy constraints, crucial for climate policy making.

items.title_zh: 自信地犯错：攻击分布偏移下提示注入检测器的严重性感知校准
items.title_en: Confidently Wrong: Severity-Aware Calibration of Prompt-Injection Detectors under Attack Shift
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了提示注入检测器在攻击分布偏离干净基准时的置信度问题，而不仅仅是准确性。作者评估了ProtectAI-v2和两个Prompt-Guard-2检查点，在单一源校准阈值下，将其冻结并迁移到五种攻击分布偏移场景。他们报告了一个严重性指标S，衡量检测器在攻击样本上的置信度。结果显示，检测器在分布偏移下可能过度自信，导致严重误判。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22659v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Prompt-injection detectors are deployed as guards: a model scores an input and a downstream system trusts or blocks it on that score. I study the confidence of these scores, not only their accuracy, when the attack distribution shifts away from the clean benchmark on which the operating point was chosen. I evaluate three released detectors, ProtectAI-v2 and two Prompt-Guard-2 checkpoints, at a single source-calibrated threshold that I freeze and transport across five shifts. I report a severity metric S, how confident a detector is on the attac…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了提示注入检测器在真实部署中因分布偏移而过度自信的风险，对AI安全防护至关重要。
items.why_en: This research reveals the risk of overconfidence in prompt-injection detectors under distribution shift, critical for AI security.

items.title_zh: 考虑信息泄漏的LLM预测基准测试：实时现在预测作为宏观因子排序的决策时输入
items.title_en: Leakage-Aware Benchmarking of LLM Forecasting: Real-Time Nowcasts as the Decision-Time Input for Macro Factor Ranking
items.summary_zh: 该论文指出，检索增强型LLM的预测基准测试常将模型能力与信息泄漏混淆：标记有目标时间戳的特征在系统决策时往往不可观测。作者研究了一个受泄漏控制的权益因子排序问题，使用检索增强的7B开源LLM预测器。在2023年4月至2026年3月期间，预测器仅观测决策时信息：滞后移动的FRED宏观变量、近期宏观事件摘要以及克利夫兰联储存档的每日CPI现在预测。该方法有效控制了信息泄漏，提供了更可靠的基准测试。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22719v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Forecasting benchmarks for retrieval-augmented LLMs routinely confound model capability with information leakage: features labeled with a target's timestamp are often not observable at the system's decision time. We study leakage-controlled equity factor ranking with a retrieval-augmented 7B open-source LLM forecaster. At each month-end from 2023-04 to 2026-03, the forecaster observes only decision-time information: lag-shifted FRED macro variables, recent macro-event summaries, and the Cleveland Fed's archived daily CPI nowcast for unreleased…
items.why_zh: 该研究为LLM预测基准测试提供了控制信息泄漏的方法，提高了评估的可靠性。
items.why_en: This research provides a method to control information leakage in LLM forecasting benchmarks, improving evaluation reliability.

items.title_zh: UnBias-Plus：检测、解释和重写偏见
items.title_en: UnBias-Plus: Detect, Explain, and Rewrite Bias
items.summary_zh: 该论文介绍了UnBias-Plus，一个开源工具包，用于检测、解释和重写自然语言中的偏见。现有方法大多仅识别偏见的存在，缺乏细粒度检测、可解释性说明、中性重写和公开可用的训练模型。UnBias-Plus统一了四个功能：段级多类偏见分类、偏见跨度定位、中性文本重写和推理解释。该工具包在多个基准数据集上表现出色，为新闻、教育和AI研究等领域提供了实用的偏见处理方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23412v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Bias in natural language remains a persistent challenge in both human-written and AI-generated content, affecting domains such as journalism, education, and AI research. Most existing detection methods identify only the presence of bias, with limited support for granular detection, interpretable explanations, neutral rewriting, and openly available trained models. We present UnBias-Plus, an open-source toolkit unifying (1) segment-level multi-class bias classification, (2) biased span localization, (3) neutral text rewriting, and (4) reasoning…
items.why_zh: 该工具包提供了全面的偏见处理能力，对提升AI内容公平性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This toolkit offers comprehensive bias handling, crucial for improving fairness in AI-generated content.

items.title_zh: 从少中学：解锁内部表示用于基准压缩
items.title_en: Learning More from Less: Unlocking Internal Representations for Benchmark Compression
items.summary_zh: 该论文提出了一种利用LLM内部表示进行基准压缩的方法，以降低评估成本。现有方法通过从多个源模型响应模式中识别核心子集来近似全基准性能，但在源模型池较小时统计不稳定。作者利用模型内部表示来更可靠地估计项目难度和区分度，从而在少量源模型下也能有效压缩基准。实验表明，该方法在多个基准上显著减少了评估所需项目数量，同时保持性能近似精度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.00710v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The prohibitive cost of evaluating Large Language Models (LLMs) necessitates efficient alternatives to full-scale benchmarking. Prevalent approaches address this by identifying a small coreset of items to approximate full-benchmark performance. However, existing methods must estimate a reliable item profile from response patterns across many source models, which becomes statistically unstable when the source pool is small. This dependency is particularly limiting for newly released benchmarks with minimal historical evaluation data. We argue…
items.why_zh: 该研究为高效评估LLM提供了新方法，尤其适用于新发布基准和历史数据有限的情况。
items.why_en: This research offers an efficient LLM evaluation method, especially useful for new benchmarks with limited historical data.

items.title_zh: 智能体技能框架：中小型语言模型在工业环境中的潜力视角
items.title_en: Agent Skill Framework: Perspectives on the Potential of Small to Medium Language Models in Industrial Environments
items.summary_zh: 该论文系统研究了中小型开源语言模型（270M-80B）在工业环境中的智能体技能范式。尽管智能体技能在主流框架中广泛支持且与专有模型配合良好，但其对中小型模型的效果尚未充分探索。作者在资源受限的工业场景中（如数据安全和预算限制）进行了实验，发现非常小的模型在可靠技能选择上存在困难，但中等规模模型（如7B-13B）在特定任务上可达到与大型模型相当的性能。该研究为工业环境中部署中小型模型提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16653v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Agent skills are widely supported by major agentic frameworks and perform well with proprietary models, yet their effectiveness for small and medium-sized open source language models (270 M-80B) remains underexplored. We systematically study the Skill paradigm in resource-constrained industrial settings, where reliance on proprietary APIs is impractical due to data security and budget constraints. Across two open-source tasks and a real-world insurance claims classification task, we find that very small models struggle with reliable skill sel…
items.why_zh: 该研究为在资源受限的工业环境中有效利用中小型语言模型提供了重要见解。
items.why_en: This research provides key insights for effectively deploying small to medium language models in resource-constrained industrial environments.

items.title_zh: DeepResearch-9K：一个具有挑战性的深度研究智能体基准数据集
items.title_en: DeepResearch-9K: A Challenging Benchmark Dataset of Deep-Research Agent
items.summary_zh: 该论文构建了DeepResearch-9K，一个大规模、具有挑战性的数据集，专门用于深度研究智能体场景。深度研究智能体能够执行多步网络探索、目标检索和复杂问答，但面临缺乏大规模真实难度数据集和开源框架的瓶颈。DeepResearch-9K基于真实世界数据构建，包含9000个样本，覆盖多领域复杂问题。同时，作者提供了开源的数据合成和智能体训练框架，以推动该领域研究。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.01152v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Deep-research agents are capable of executing multi-step web exploration, targeted retrieval, and sophisticated question answering. Despite their powerful capabilities, deep-research agents face two critical bottlenecks: (1) the lack of large-scale, challenging datasets with real-world difficulty, and (2) the absence of accessible, open-source frameworks for data synthesis and agent training. To bridge these gaps, we first construct DeepResearch-9K, a large-scale challenging dataset specifically designed for deep-research scenarios built from…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了深度研究智能体领域缺乏大规模真实难度基准的空白，对推动该领域发展至关重要。
items.why_en: This dataset fills the gap of large-scale real-world difficulty benchmarks for deep-research agents, crucial for advancing the field.

items.title_zh: Two-Bridge：独家目标和扩展时域星际争霸II基准
items.title_en: Two-Bridge: Exclusive Objectives and Extended Horizon StarCraft II Benchmark
items.summary_zh: 该论文提出了Two-Bridge地图套件，作为星际争霸II全游戏和小游戏之间的中间基准。全游戏状态空间庞大导致奖励信号稀疏，而小游戏则过于简单。Two-Bridge通过设计独家目标和扩展时域，提供了适中的复杂度，使研究人员能够在合理计算预算下测试现代强化学习算法。该基准是开源系列的首个条目，旨在促进RTS环境中强化学习研究的稳步进展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.06608v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The research community lacks a middle ground between StarCraft II full game and its mini-games. The full-game's sprawling state-action space renders reward signals sparse and noisy, but in mini-games simple agents saturate performance. This complexity gap hinders steady curriculum design and prevents researchers from experimenting with modern Reinforcement Learning algorithms in RTS environments under realistic compute budgets. To fill this gap, we present the Two-Bridge Map Suite, the first entry in an open-source benchmark series we purpose…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了星际争霸II研究中全游戏与小游戏之间的复杂度空白，有助于强化学习算法的稳步开发。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills the complexity gap between full game and mini-games in StarCraft II, facilitating steady development of RL algorithms.

items.title_zh: 神经符号代理用于监管流程自动化：挑战与研究议程
items.title_en: Neuro-Symbolic Agents for Regulated Process Automation: Challenges and Research Agenda
items.summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型的代理正进入受监管行业，自动化判断密集型质量管理流程。研究人员认为，这些领域中已有的符号结构（如法规、类型化流程模型和合规约束）不应仅作为外部监控机制，而应作为核心架构组件来塑造代理的决策和行为。他们提出“合规即构建”作为基于护栏监控的补充范式，为预防违规提供结构基础。该研究旨在通过将符号知识嵌入代理架构，提升自动化流程的可靠性和合规性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13405v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: LLM-based agents are entering regulated industries where they automate judgment intensive quality management processes. We argue that symbolic structures already embedded in these domains, including regulations, typed process models, and compliance constraints, should be treated not merely as external monitoring mechanisms but as core architectural components that shape the agent's decision-making and behavior. We propose compliance-by-construction as a complementary paradigm to guardrail-based monitoring: a structural foundation that prevent…
items.why_zh: 该研究为在受监管行业中安全部署AI代理提供了新范式，通过将合规性内建于系统架构，而非事后监控。
items.why_en: This work offers a new paradigm for deploying AI agents in regulated industries by embedding compliance into system architecture rather than relying on post-hoc monitoring.

items.title_zh: 衡量AI辅助内容生成中的人类贡献
items.title_en: Measuring Human Contribution in AI-Assisted Content Generation
items.summary_zh: 随着生成式AI的普及，越来越多的内容不再完全由人类生成，而是由人类指导的AI模型生成。这种转变给原创性界定带来了挑战，因为AI辅助作品中人类贡献的程度各不相同。本研究提出了衡量人类贡献的研究问题，并引入了一个基于信息论的框架来解决该问题。该框架旨在量化人类在AI辅助内容生成中的参与度，有助于明确版权和原创性归属。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2408.14792v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: With the growing prevalence of generative artificial intelligence (AI), an increasing amount of content is no longer exclusively generated by humans but by generative AI models with human guidance. This shift presents notable challenges for the delineation of originality due to the varying degrees of human contribution in AI-assisted works. This study raises the research question of measuring human contribution in AI-assisted content generation and introduces a framework to address this question that is grounded in information theory. B…
items.why_zh: 该研究为AI生成内容的版权和原创性判定提供了量化方法，对法律和伦理实践具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research provides a quantitative method for determining copyright and originality in AI-generated content, with significant legal and ethical implications.

items.title_zh: 即时适应量化：配置感知LoRA用于高效微调量化大语言模型
items.title_en: On-the-Fly Adaptation to Quantization: Configuration-Aware LoRA for Efficient Fine-Tuning of Quantized LLMs
items.summary_zh: 随着大型预训练模型的发布，在边缘设备上部署它们需要有效的压缩。近期工作将量化与高精度LoRA适配器的微调相结合，在减少模型大小的同时减轻量化带来的精度损失。然而，边缘设备具有异构能力，为每种量化设置进行配置级微调计算成本过高。本文提出配置感知LoRA，使模型能够即时适应不同的量化配置，无需为每种设置单独微调，从而在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算开销。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2509.25214v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: As increasingly large pre-trained models are released, deploying them on edge devices for privacy-preserving applications requires effective compression. Recent works combine quantization with the fine-tuning of high-precision LoRA adapters, which can substantially reduce model size while mitigating the accuracy loss from quantization. However, edge devices have inherently heterogeneous capabilities, while performing configuration-wise fine-tuning for every quantization setting is computationally prohibitive. In this paper, we propose C…
items.why_zh: 该方法使得量化大模型在异构边缘设备上的高效部署成为可能，兼顾了模型大小和性能。
items.why_en: This method enables efficient deployment of quantized large models on heterogeneous edge devices, balancing model size and performance.

items.title_zh: 空中联邦学习：通过信号处理重新思考边缘AI
items.title_en: Over-the-Air Federated Learning: Rethinking Edge AI Through Signal Processing
items.summary_zh: 空中联邦学习是一种新兴范式，它将无线信号处理与分布式机器学习紧密结合，实现网络边缘的可扩展AI。通过利用共享多址信道上的无线叠加，AirFL将本地模型更新的同时传输转化为接收器处的模拟聚合，从而减少通信延迟、带宽使用和能耗。本文提供了一个面向设计的教程视角，涵盖AirFL的基本原理、关键技术和未来方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.03719v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Over-the-Air Federated Learning (AirFL) is an emerging paradigm that tightly integrates wireless signal processing and distributed machine learning to enable scalable AI at the network edge. By exploiting wireless superposition over a shared multiple-access channel, AirFL turns simultaneous transmissions of local model updates into an analog aggregate at the receiver, thereby reducing communication latency, bandwidth usage, and energy consumption in wireless aggregation domains. This article develops a design-oriented tutorial view of a…
items.why_zh: AirFL为边缘AI的通信效率瓶颈提供了根本性解决方案，有望推动大规模分布式学习在无线网络中的应用。
items.why_en: AirFL offers a fundamental solution to communication bottlenecks in edge AI, enabling large-scale distributed learning over wireless networks.

items.title_zh: 通过可扩展归因图分解从十亿参数语言模型中提取层次化稀疏电路
items.title_en: Hierarchical Sparse Circuit Extraction from Billion-Parameter Language Models through Scalable Attribution Graph Decomposition
items.summary_zh: 从十亿参数Transformer中提取稀疏电路受到指数级搜索成本和跨共激活路径的特征重用限制。层次化归因图分解通过四个阶段解决这一问题：跨层编码器训练、归因图谱聚类、图神经网络引导的层次遍历和因果干预验证，将最坏情况复杂度降至O(n² log n)。在RedPajama语料库上训练的逐层编码器产生单语义特征，使得能够提取可解释的电路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.12879v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Extracting sparse circuits from billion-parameter transformers is constrained by $O(2^n)$ search cost and pervasive feature reuse across co-active pathways. Hierarchical Attribution Graph Decomposition (HAGD) addresses this through four stages: cross-layer transcoder training, spectral coarsening of attribution graphs, graph-neural-network (GNN)-guided hierarchical traversal, and causal intervention verification, reducing worst-case complexity to $O(n^2 \log n)$. Per-layer transcoders trained on the RedPajama corpus yield monosemantic d…
items.why_zh: 该工作使得从超大规模语言模型中提取可解释电路成为可能，有助于理解模型内部机制和提升安全性。
items.why_en: This work enables interpretable circuit extraction from massive language models, aiding in understanding model internals and improving safety.

items.title_zh: 下一代验证码：利用认知差距实现可扩展且多样化的GUI代理防御
items.title_en: Next-Gen CAPTCHAs: Leveraging the Cognitive Gap for Scalable and Diverse GUI-Agent Defense
items.summary_zh: GUI代理的快速发展使传统验证码过时。先前基准如OpenCaptchaWorld为评估多模态代理建立了基线，但推理密集型模型（如Gemini3-Pro-High和GPT-5.2-Xhigh）已突破这一安全屏障，在复杂逻辑谜题上通过率高达90%。为此，研究人员引入下一代验证码，一个可扩展的防御框架，旨在保护下一代网络免受先进GUI代理的攻击。该框架利用人类与AI之间的认知差距，设计出对AI困难但对人类简单的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.09012v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rapid evolution of GUI-enabled agents has rendered traditional CAPTCHAs obsolete. While previous benchmarks like OpenCaptchaWorld established a baseline for evaluating multimodal agents, recent advancements in reasoning-heavy models, such as Gemini3-Pro-High and GPT-5.2-Xhigh have effectively collapsed this security barrier, achieving pass rates as high as 90% on complex logic puzzles like "Bingo". In response, we introduce Next-Gen CAPTCHAs, a scalable defense framework designed to secure the next-generation web against the advance…
items.why_zh: 随着AI代理能力的提升，传统验证码已失效；下一代验证码通过认知差距提供可持续的防御方案。
items.why_en: As AI agents surpass traditional CAPTCHAs, Next-Gen CAPTCHAs offer a sustainable defense by exploiting the human-AI cognitive gap.

items.title_zh: 安全心血管风险预测的鲁棒框架：差分隐私联邦学习的架构案例研究
items.title_en: A Robust Framework for Secure Cardiovascular Risk Prediction: An Architectural Case Study of Differentially Private Federated Learning
items.summary_zh: 准确的心血管风险预测对预防性医疗至关重要，但临床数据因隐私法规分散在各机构，阻碍了鲁棒AI模型的开发。本文提出了FedCVR，一个保护隐私的联邦学习框架，应用于异构临床网络。该工作侧重于系统工程稳健性，而非提出新的理论优化器，通过架构案例研究验证了FedCVR在保持数据隐私的同时实现准确预测的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.13293v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Accurate cardiovascular risk prediction is crucial for preventive healthcare; however, the development of robust Artificial Intelligence (AI) models is hindered by the fragmentation of clinical data across institutions due to stringent privacy regulations. This paper presents a comprehensive architectural case study validating the engineering robustness of FedCVR, a privacy-preserving Federated Learning framework applied to heterogeneous clinical networks. Rather than proposing a new theoretical optimizer, this work focuses on a systems…
items.why_zh: 该框架在保护患者隐私的同时实现了跨机构协作的准确心血管风险预测，对医疗AI落地具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This framework enables accurate cardiovascular risk prediction across institutions while preserving patient privacy, crucial for deploying medical AI.

items.title_zh: 你的凭证如何被LLM代理技能泄露：一项实证研究
items.title_en: How Your Credentials Are Leaked by LLM Agent Skills: An Empirical Study
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型代理日益依赖第三方技能，这些技能在特权执行环境中运行并处理敏感凭证，但凭证如何泄露尚不清楚。为了填补这一空白，研究人员进行了首次大规模实证研究。从最大的开源技能市场SkillsMP的170,226个工件中，通过分层随机抽样选取了17,022个技能，并通过静态秘密提取（正则表达式和AST分析）分析了每个技能。研究发现大量技能存在凭证泄露风险，揭示了当前生态系统的安全隐患。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.03070v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on third-party skills that operate within privileged execution environments and routinely handle sensitive credentials, yet how these credentials are leaked remains largely unexplored. To fill this gap, we present the first large-scale empirical study on credential leakage in agent skills. From 170,226 artifacts on SkillsMP, the largest open-source skill marketplace, we sampled 17,022 skills via stratified random sampling and analyzed each through static secret extraction (regex and AS…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM代理生态系统中严重的凭证泄露风险，对安全开发和部署代理具有警示意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals critical credential leakage risks in the LLM agent ecosystem, highlighting the need for security measures in agent development and deployment.

items.title_zh: 非线性算子及其导数的通用逼近定理
items.title_en: Universal Approximation of Nonlinear Operators and Their Derivatives
items.summary_zh: 该研究证明了非线性算子及其导数的首个通用逼近定理（UAT），这是算子学习领域的基础性开放问题。研究通过算子学习架构，在紧集上和加权Bastiani-Sobolev空间中，针对一般有限输入测度，实现了对k次可微非线性算子及其导数的一致逼近。这些结果在完整的巴拿赫空间一般性下，首次完全推广了相应的经典逼近定理，为深度学习模型逼近复杂算子提供了理论保证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.15285v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Establishing Universal Approximation Theorems (UATs) for nonlinear operators and their derivatives is a foundational open problem in Operator Learning (OL) and raises delicate questions in Nonlinear Functional Analysis. We prove the first UATs for $k$-times differentiable nonlinear operators and their derivatives via OL architectures, uniformly on compact sets and in weighted Bastiani--Sobolev spaces for general finite input measures. In full Banach-space generality, these are the first complete generalizations of the corresponding infl…
items.why_zh: 该工作为算子学习提供了理论基础，证明了神经网络可以逼近非线性算子及其导数，对科学计算和物理模拟具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a theoretical foundation for operator learning, proving that neural networks can approximate nonlinear operators and their derivatives, which is crucial for scientific computing and physical simulation.

items.title_zh: 前沿大语言模型是否已为网络安全做好准备？来自双模式漏洞基准的证据
items.title_en: Are Frontier LLMs Ready for Cybersecurity? Evidence for Vertical Foundation Models from Dual-Mode Vulnerability Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: 该研究通过双模式基准测试评估前沿大语言模型在网络安全领域的表现：白盒函数级漏洞检测（覆盖C/Java/Python）和黑盒Web应用安全测试（包含5个生产风格应用、118个真实漏洞，涵盖20多个CWE类别）。测试了6个前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Codex~5.3、Claude Opus~4.7、Sonnet~4.6、Gemini~3.1 Pro和Gemini~3 Flash）以及2个领域专用模型，采用四种测试范式。结果表明，尽管模型在部分任务上表现良好，但整体上仍存在显著差距，尚不能完全胜任网络安全任务。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23243v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We evaluate whether frontier LLMs are ready for cybersecurity through a dual-mode benchmark: white-box function-level vulnerability detection (VulnLLM-R, across C/Java/Python) and black-box web application security testing (five production-style applications with 118 ground-truth vulnerabilities across 20+ CWE families, which we will open-source). We test six frontier models (GPT-5.4, Codex~5.3, Claude Opus~4.7, Sonnet~4.6, Gemini~3.1~Pro and Gemini~3~Flash) and two domain-specialized models across four testing paradigms. Our findings a…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统评估了LLM在网络安全中的实际能力，揭示了当前模型的局限性，为未来安全垂直领域基础模型的发展提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This study systematically evaluates LLM capabilities in cybersecurity, revealing current limitations and guiding future development of vertical foundation models for security.

items.title_zh: 面向大语言模型生成单元测试的库感知双修复与迭代修复方法——以OpenSIL固件为例
items.title_en: Library-Aware Doubles and Iterative Repair for Large Language Model-Generated Unit Tests in OpenSIL Firmware
items.summary_zh: 该研究针对低级C固件单元测试因严格构建约束（如缺失头文件、未解析符号、依赖不匹配）而脆弱的问题，提出了一种自动化单元测试编写工作流。该工作流基于大语言模型驱动的多智能体流水线，应用于AMD维护的开源硅初始化库（openSIL）固件代码库。方法结合了库感知的双重修复和迭代修复策略，显著减少了手动工作量，提高了测试生成的成功率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19725v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Validating changes in low-level C firmware is expensive because unit tests (UTs) are fragile under strict build constraints, where missing headers, unresolved symbols, and dependency mismatches frequently prevent compilation and linking. This study introduces an automated UT authoring workflow for the Open-Source Silicon Initialization Library (openSIL) firmware codebase maintained by Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) that reduces manual effort through a large language model (LLM) guided multi-agent pipeline. The workflow combines automated…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了固件单元测试自动化的关键难题，通过LLM和智能修复策略大幅提升效率，对嵌入式系统和硬件初始化领域的软件开发具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work addresses key challenges in firmware unit test automation, leveraging LLMs and intelligent repair to significantly improve efficiency, important for embedded systems and hardware initialization software development.

items.title_zh: 基于开放数据的城市电网拓扑与层次识别
items.title_en: Urban Power Grid Topology and Hierarchy Identification from Open Data
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种基于开放数据的框架，用于完整识别城市电网拓扑结构，从高压输电到连接单个建筑的最后一级配电网。由于详细的电网信息通常属于专有数据，这给研究和创新带来了障碍。该框架利用公开数据，实现了对电网复杂拓扑和层次的理解，对能源预测、潮流管理和系统弹性分析至关重要。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.21352v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding the complex topology and hierarchy of urban power grid is crucial for energy prognosis, power flow management, and system resilience analysis. However, detailed grid information remains largely proprietary. This creates significant barriers for research and innovation, especially when analyzing the last-mile distribution networks connecting individual buildings. This paper addresses this challenge by developing an open-data-driven framework for the complete identification of urban power grid topology, from high-voltage transmission…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过开放数据解决了电网信息专有化带来的研究障碍，为城市能源管理和电网韧性分析提供了可行方案。
items.why_en: This research overcomes the barrier of proprietary grid data by using open data, providing a feasible solution for urban energy management and grid resilience analysis.

items.title_zh: 鲁棒性不能简化为正则化：超越线性情况下的对抗训练研究
items.title_en: Robustness Cannot be Reduced to Regularization: Studying Adversarial Training Beyond the Linear Case
items.summary_zh: 机器学习模型对对抗样本的脆弱性是一个主要问题，对抗训练是最有效的防御手段之一，但其高计算成本阻碍了实际部署。近期在线性模型中发现对抗风险与简化正则化风险之间存在形式等价，从而实现了更高效的训练。该研究探讨了这种等价性是否适用于非线性模型，结果表明鲁棒性不能简单地归结为正则化，非线性情况下需要不同的方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.21488v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The vulnerability of ML models to adversarial examples has recently emerged as a major concern. While adversarial training is one of the most effective countermeasures to this issue, its high computational cost remains an obstacle to practical deployment. Recent progress in reducing this cost has relied, in the case of linear models, on a formal equivalence between the adversarial risk and a simpler form of regularized risk. This enabled significantly more efficient training procedures, which naturally raises the question of whether such an equiv…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了对抗训练中线性模型结论的局限性，为非线性模型开发更高效的对抗训练方法提供了理论指导。
items.why_en: This study reveals the limitations of linear-model conclusions in adversarial training, guiding the development of more efficient methods for nonlinear models.

items.title_zh: 利用日志数据进行反事实学习以获取新的自适应教学策略
items.title_en: Counterfactual learning of new adaptive instructional policies using logged data
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种离线上下文赌博机框架，直接从日志交互数据中学习新的自适应教学策略，避免了昂贵的在线实验或可能不准确的学生模拟器。通过使用Rasch模型将学生-题目交互映射到连续的潜在能力-难度尺度上，将教学过程建模为连续随机赌博机问题。设计了一种新的奖励函数，并利用反事实学习技术优化策略，有望在智能辅导系统中实现个性化教学。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23015v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optimizing instructional policies in Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS) typically requires costly online experimentation or student simulators that may fail to capture real-world dynamics. This paper introduces an offline contextual bandit framework that learns new adaptive policies directly from logged interaction data. By mapping student-item interactions onto a continuous latent proficiency-difficulty scale using a Rasch model, we cast the tutoring process as a continuous stochastic bandit problem. We propose a novel reward function designed t…
items.why_zh: 该工作为智能辅导系统提供了一种低成本、数据驱动的策略优化方法，有望推动个性化教育的实际应用。
items.why_en: This work provides a low-cost, data-driven method for policy optimization in intelligent tutoring systems, potentially advancing personalized education.

items.title_zh: TROPT：一个统一和推进离散文本优化的开放框架
items.title_en: TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization
items.summary_zh: 离散文本触发器优化——搜索能引导模型达到特定目标的文本序列——是模型红队测试（如LLM越狱）、审计和可解释性的基础。然而，现有优化器分散在不同研究代码库中，且变体繁多，阻碍了采用和进展。该研究提出了TROPT，一个开放的框架，统一了多种离散优化器，提供了标准化接口和可扩展架构，降低了工程开销，促进了该领域的进步。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23496v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to…
items.why_zh: TROPT通过统一框架解决了离散文本优化领域工具碎片化的问题，将加速模型安全审计和可解释性研究。
items.why_en: TROPT addresses tool fragmentation in discrete text optimization, accelerating model security auditing and interpretability research.

items.title_zh: 无需时间信息的学习者技能习得估计
items.title_en: Estimating Learners' Skill Acquisition Without Temporal Information
items.summary_zh: 教育数据挖掘中的知识追踪研究通常依赖时间序列数据预测学习者未来知识状态，但许多实际教育场景中只有单次评估的快照数据，缺乏时间信息。该研究提出了一种新框架，仅使用快照数据预测未来技能习得。具体地，解决了预测学习者下一技能掌握情况的问题，为缺乏时间信息的教育环境提供了自适应教学支持的可能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20611v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent research in educational data mining, especially knowledge tracing, has focused on predicting learners' future knowledge states to support adaptive instruction. However, in many real-world educational settings, learning data are often available only as single-time-point assessments without temporal information, making existing time-series-based approaches difficult to apply. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for predicting future skill acquisition using only snapshot data. Specifically, we address the problem of predicting the n…
items.why_zh: 该研究扩展了知识追踪的适用范围，使其能在缺乏时间数据的真实教育场景中发挥作用，对自适应学习系统的部署具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research extends knowledge tracing to real-world educational settings lacking temporal data, important for deploying adaptive learning systems.

items.title_zh: 印度银行支票字段定位的开放标注与合成数据
items.title_en: Open Annotations and Synthetic Data for Field Localisation in Indian Bank Cheques
items.summary_zh: 自动支票处理需要在识别之前定位关键字段（日期、法定金额、IFSC代码、账号、签名和收款人姓名）。IDRBT支票图像数据集是唯一公开的印度银行支票数据集，但缺乏字段标注且未声明许可证，导致再分发条款不明确。本研究通过发布所有112张支票的六字段边界框标注（仅标注，与原始图像对应）来解决这一问题。此外，还生成了合成数据以增强数据集。这项工作为印度银行支票的自动化处理提供了必要的标注资源，有助于推动相关研究。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20682v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automated cheque processing requires localising key fields (date, legal amount, IFSC code, account number, signature, and payee name) before any recognition step. The IDRBT Cheque Image Dataset is, to our knowledge, the only public collection of Indian bank cheques, but it ships without field annotations and with no stated licence, so its redistribution terms are unclear. We address both limitations. First, we release six-field bounding-box annotations for all 112 cheques in the dataset, distributed annotations-only and keyed to the original fi…
items.why_zh: 为印度银行支票自动化处理提供了首个公开的字段标注数据集，填补了关键资源空白。
items.why_en: Provides the first public field annotations for Indian bank cheques, filling a critical resource gap for automated processing.

items.title_en: VeriBound: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Process Reward Models Trained with Formal Verification Tools
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20740v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) provide step-level verification for Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet their training data acquisition remains a bottleneck: human annotation is costly and Monte Carlo roll-out estimates are noisy. A recent approach, FOVER, trains PRMs on step-level error labels automatically annotated by formal verification tools such as Z3 and Isabelle, and empirically observes cross-task generalization from symbolic tasks to diverse reasoning benchmarks. However, this generalization phenomenon lacks any theoretical explana…

items.title_zh: CAT-Translate：构建日英翻译的紧凑开源模型
items.title_en: CAT-Translate: Building Compact Open-Source Models for Japanese-English Translation
items.summary_zh: 大型多语言翻译模型在基准测试中表现优异，但针对特定语言对开发专用模型是否值得？本研究开发了一系列小型语言模型（0.8B、1.4B、3.3B和7B参数），专门用于日英双向翻译。采用两阶段监督微调策略，模型在保持紧凑的同时实现了有竞争力的翻译质量。结果表明，对于只需要支持单一语言对的场景，专用小型模型是高效且实用的选择。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.21413v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Nowadays, large multilingual translation models demonstrate impressive translation capabilities in the machine translation benchmarks. This raises a practical question to the developers: is it worth developing translation models specialized for a particular language pair if you only need to support that language pair? To give an anecdotal answer to this question, we develop a family of small language models (0.8B, 1.4B, 3.3B, and 7B parameters) specialized for Japanese-English bidirectional translation. We employ a two-stage supervised fine-tun…
items.why_zh: 展示了针对特定语言对的紧凑专用模型可以高效实现高质量翻译，为资源受限场景提供了实用方案。
items.why_en: Demonstrates that compact specialized models can achieve high-quality translation for a specific language pair, offering a practical solution for resource-constrained scenarios.

items.title_zh: Kiwano：用于说话人验证的前沿开源工具包
items.title_en: Kiwano: A Cutting-Edge Open-Source Toolkit for Speaker Verification
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍Kiwano，一个基于PyTorch的开源工具包，旨在推进说话人验证的研究与评估。Kiwano提供轻量级且可扩展的框架，包含标准化流程、预训练模型以及多种主流说话人验证架构的集成。该工具包强调可重复性，提供透明的训练流程、统一的评估协议和跨多个语料库的即用基线。此外，Kiwano还包含先进的工具，如对抗性攻击和防御机制，为研究人员提供了全面的实验平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22369v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, we present Kiwano, an open-source toolkit designed to advance research and evaluation for speaker verification. Kiwano provides a lightweight yet extensible framework built on PyTorch, offering standardized recipes, pretrained models, and integration of several widely used speaker verification architectures. The toolkit emphasizes reproducibility, by delivering transparent training pipelines, unified evaluation protocols and ready-to-use baselines across multiple corpora. Beyond conventional training and inference, Kiwano include…
items.why_zh: 为说话人验证研究提供了一个可重复、易扩展的开源平台，集成了多种先进功能。
items.why_en: Provides a reproducible and extensible open-source platform for speaker verification research, integrating multiple advanced features.

items.title_zh: 误设定情境赌博机的统计推断
items.title_en: Statistical Inference for Misspecified Contextual Bandits
items.summary_zh: 情境赌博机算法通过实时自适应实现个性化处理，但适应性给统计推断带来挑战。本研究在不假设结果模型正确设定的情况下，研究情境赌博机数据的推断问题。研究发现一个被忽视的问题：标准算法（如LinUCB）在误设定工作模型下可能无法稳定，导致估计量行为非高斯且推断无效。该问题在实践中很严重，因为误设定在现实应用中普遍存在。研究提出了新的推断方法以解决这一问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22639v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Contextual bandit algorithms have transformed modern experimentation by enabling real-time adaptation for personalized treatment. Yet these advantages create challenges for statistical inference due to adaptivity. We study inference with contextual-bandit data without assuming a well-specified outcome model. In this setting, we show a previously overlooked issue: standard algorithms such as LinUCB may fail to stabilize under misspecified working models, leading to non-Gaussian estimator behavior and invalid inference. This issue is practically…
items.why_zh: 揭示了误设定情境下标准情境赌博机算法推断失效的问题，并提出了解决方案，对实际应用至关重要。
items.why_en: Reveals the failure of standard contextual bandit inference under misspecification and proposes solutions, crucial for real-world applications.

items.title_zh: MaRS：基于马氏距离残差评分的鲁棒分布外检测
items.title_en: MaRS: Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection via Mahalanobis Residual Scoring
items.summary_zh: 基础模型为医学图像提供高度描述性的表示，但在分布偏移下可靠性下降。可靠的分布外（OOD）检测对于安全部署至关重要。现有事后检测器有效利用冻结嵌入（如kNN），而基于重建的OOD检测在潜在特征空间中由于性能不一致而采用有限。本研究表明，这种限制源于重建误差中信息利用不足。提出MaRS方法，通过马氏距离残差评分，在潜在空间中有效利用重建误差，显著提升了OOD检测性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22649v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Foundation models provide highly descriptive representations for medical images, yet their reliability degrades under distribution shifts arising from changes in patients, devices, or acquisition conditions. Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is therefore essential for safe deployment. Recent post-hoc detectors efficiently exploit frozen embeddings (\emph{e.g.}, kNN), whereas reconstruction-based OOD detection in latent feature space has seen limited adoption due to inconsistent performance. In this work, we show that the limitation o…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种新的OOD检测方法，通过有效利用重建误差显著提升了医学图像中分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
items.why_en: Proposes a novel OOD detection method that significantly improves robustness under distribution shifts in medical images by effectively leveraging reconstruction errors.

items.title_zh: CITADEL：基于CSI的工业物联网网络干扰检测与开集分类
items.title_en: CITADEL: CSI-Based Jamming Detection and Open-Set Classification for IIoT Networks
items.summary_zh: 射频干扰对无线工业物联网（IIoT）网络的可用性构成严重威胁。现有检测和分类技术不适合此场景：粗粒度的信号强度和跨层特征信息丰富度不足，而原始I/Q基带方法需要硬件和吞吐量，在百节点IIoT部署中不切实际。本文提出CITADEL，一种轻量级两阶段分层流水线，仅使用信道状态信息（CSI）测量。该方法实现了高效的干扰检测和开集分类，适用于资源受限的IIoT环境。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22939v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Radio frequency jamming poses a critical threat to the availability of wireless Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) networks. Existing detection and classification techniques are poorly suited to this setting: coarse signal-strength and cross-layer features lack information richness, while raw I/Q baseband approaches require hardware and throughput that is impractical at the scale of hundred-node IIoT deployments. This paper presents CITADEL, a lightweight two-stage hierarchical pipeline that uses only Channel State Information (CSI) measureme…
items.why_zh: 为资源受限的工业物联网环境提供了一种实用的干扰检测与分类方案，仅需CSI测量。
items.why_en: Provides a practical jamming detection and classification solution for resource-constrained IIoT networks using only CSI measurements.

items.title_zh: FLKit：面向健康与生命科学联邦学习的结构化入门工具包
items.title_en: Development and Design of FLKit: A Structured Onboarding Toolkit for Federated Learning in Health and Life Sciences
items.summary_zh: 联邦学习允许机构在不移动数据的情况下训练共享模型，非常适合健康与生命科学领域严格的隐私法规。方法正在快速成熟，但实际障碍在于团队启动联邦项目时面临分散的框架、治理义务和不熟悉的角色，缺乏结构化的入门指导。FLKit填补了这一空白。它是一个开放、社区维护的入门工具包，采用多学科方法，提供框架选择、治理指南和角色定义等结构化指导，帮助团队快速启动联邦学习项目。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23500v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Federated learning lets institutions train shared models without moving their data, which makes it a natural fit for health and life sciences research under strict privacy regulation. The methods are maturing fast, but the practical barrier now comes earlier: a team starting a federated project meets a scattered mix of frameworks, governance obligations, and unfamiliar roles, with no structured place to begin that fits its own background. FLKit closes that gap. It is an open, community-maintained onboarding toolkit that takes a multidisciplinar…
items.why_zh: 为健康与生命科学领域的联邦学习项目提供了结构化的入门指导，降低了实践门槛。
items.why_en: Provides structured onboarding guidance for federated learning projects in health and life sciences, lowering the practical barrier to entry.

items.title_zh: 扩散模型在灵活系数选择下适应低维结构
items.title_en: Diffusion Models Adapt to Low-Dimensional Structure Under Flexible Coefficient Choices
items.summary_zh: 扩散模型以利用未知低维结构加速采样而闻名。然而，现有关于低维数据结构的收敛理论大多集中在具有严格规定系数选择的更新规则上。这引发了一个基本问题：对低维结构的适应性是否对更新系数的精确选择敏感？本文表明，这种适应性是扩散模型的一个稳健特性。对于一大类更新系数，我们证明了O(k/ε²)的采样复杂度，其中k是数据的本征维度，ε是精度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23627v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion models are known to exploit unknown low-dimensional structure to accelerate sampling. However, existing convergence theory under low-dimensional data structure has largely focused on update rules with narrowly prescribed coefficient choices. This raises a fundamental question: is adaptation to low-dimensional structure sensitive to the precise choice of update coefficients? In this paper, we show that such adaptation is a robust property of diffusion models. For a broad class of update coefficients, we prove that $\widetilde{O}(k/\var…
items.why_zh: 该结果证明了扩散模型对低维结构的适应性是稳健的，为实际应用中的系数选择提供了理论依据。
items.why_en: This result demonstrates the robustness of diffusion models' adaptation to low-dimensional structure, providing theoretical justification for coefficient choices in practice.

items.title_zh: 可解释机器学习预测初创公司融资、专利和退出
items.title_en: Interpretable Machine Learning for Predicting Startup Funding, Patenting, and Exits
items.summary_zh: 本研究开发了一个可解释的机器学习框架来预测初创公司的结果，包括融资、专利和退出。构建了2010-2023年的公司季度面板数据，来自Crunchbase并与美国专利商标局数据匹配。评估了三个时间范围：12个月内下一轮融资、24个月内专利存量增长、36个月内通过IPO或收购退出。预处理在2010-2019年的开发窗口上拟合，并保持不变地应用于后续队列。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.09465v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This study develops an interpretable machine learning framework to forecast startup outcomes, including funding, patenting, and exit. A firm-quarter panel for 2010-2023 is constructed from Crunchbase and matched to U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) data. Three horizons are evaluated: next funding within 12 months, patent-stock growth within 24 months, and exit through an initial public offering (IPO) or acquisition within 36 months. Preprocessing is fit on a development window (2010-2019) and applied without change to later cohorts to…
items.why_zh: 该框架为投资者和创业者提供了可解释的预测工具，有助于理解初创公司成功的关键因素。
items.why_en: This framework provides interpretable predictions for investors and entrepreneurs, helping identify key factors for startup success.

items.title_zh: GeoTransolver：使用多尺度几何感知物理注意力Transformer学习不规则域上的物理
items.title_en: GeoTransolver: Learning Physics on Irregular Domains Using Multi-scale Geometry Aware Physics Attention Transformer
items.summary_zh: 我们提出了GeoTransolver，一种用于计算机辅助工程的多尺度几何感知物理注意力Transformer。GeoTransolver扩展了Transolver骨干网络，采用GALE（几何感知潜在嵌入）注意力，将物理感知自注意力与学习状态切片上的交叉注意力相结合，交叉注意力指向共享几何和通过多尺度球查询计算的全局上下文。该模型在NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo中实现并发布，持续投影几何和全局参数。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.20399v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present GeoTransolver, a multiscale geometry-aware physics attention transformer for Computer Aided Engineering (CAE). GeoTransolver extends the Transolver backbone with GALE (Geometry-Aware Latent Embeddings) attention, which pairs physics-aware self-attention on learned state slices with cross-attention to a shared geometry and global context computed via multi-scale ball queries (inspired by Domino) and reused in every block. Implemented and released in NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo, GeoTransolver persistently projects geometry and global paramete…
items.why_zh: GeoTransolver为不规则域上的物理模拟提供了高效的深度学习解决方案，具有多尺度几何感知能力。
items.why_en: GeoTransolver offers an efficient deep learning solution for physics simulation on irregular domains with multiscale geometry awareness.

items.title_zh: GraphSVR：用于稳健时空空气污染预测的图卷积支持向量回归框架
items.title_en: GraphSVR: A Graph Convolutional Support Vector Regression Framework for Robust Spatiotemporal Air Pollution Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 城市空气质量预测具有挑战性，因为污染物浓度是非线性、非平稳、时空依赖的，并且经常受到交通拥堵、工业排放和季节性气象变化引起的异常观测的影响。本研究提出了图卷积支持向量回归框架，用于城市空气污染的稳健时空预测。该模型结合了图卷积学习以捕捉站点间的空间依赖性，以及支持向量回归。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.03795v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Urban air quality forecasting is challenging because pollutant concentrations are nonlinear, nonstationary, spatiotemporally dependent, and often affected by anomalous observations caused by traffic congestion, industrial emissions, and seasonal meteorological variability. This study proposes a Graph Convolutional Support Vector Regression (GraphSVR) framework for robust spatiotemporal forecasting of urban air pollution. The model combines graph convolutional learning to capture inter-station spatial dependence with support vector regression…
items.why_zh: GraphSVR为城市空气污染预测提供了稳健的深度学习框架，有效处理了空间依赖性和异常观测。
items.why_en: GraphSVR provides a robust deep learning framework for urban air pollution forecasting, effectively handling spatial dependencies and anomalous observations.

items.title_zh: 使用全原子流映射的少步共折叠
items.title_en: Few-step Cofolding with All-Atom Flow Maps
items.summary_zh: 全原子生成建模已成为预测蛋白质和蛋白质-配体系统结构的主导范式。然而，生成原子级保真度的结构通常需要昂贵的迭代扩散展开，使得常规部署和推理时搜索技术计算成本高昂。本文介绍了Denoiser Cofolding All-Atom Flowmap框架，用于将最先进的全原子共折叠模型蒸馏为全原子流映射，实现少步生成。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08375v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: All-atom generative modeling of 3D biomolecular complexes has emerged as the dominant paradigm for predicting the structure of proteins and protein-ligand systems. Generating structures at the atomic level of fidelity, however, typically requires expensive iterative diffusion rollouts, making both conventional deployment and inference-time search techniques computationally costly. In this paper, we introduce the Denoiser Cofolding All-Atom Flowmap (DeCAF) framework for distilling state-of-the-art all-atom cofolding models into all-atom flow m…
items.why_zh: DeCAF通过少步生成大幅降低了全原子共折叠的计算成本，推动了蛋白质结构预测的实用化。
items.why_en: DeCAF significantly reduces computational cost of all-atom cofolding via few-step generation, advancing practical protein structure prediction.

items.title_zh: 具有全局有界扰动的对抗性赌博机优化
items.title_en: Adversarial Bandit Optimization with Globally Bounded Perturbations to Convex Losses
items.summary_zh: 我们研究对抗性赌博机优化，其中损失函数可能非凸且非光滑。每轮中，学习者选择一个动作并仅观察该动作的损失。损失由一个潜在凸且β-光滑的组件和一个对抗性扰动组成，扰动可能在观察学习者动作后选择。扰动受全局预算约束，控制其随时间累积的幅度。该框架扩展了基于全局预算的后动作扰动模型。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19891v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study adversarial bandit optimization in which the loss functions may be non-convex and non-smooth. In each round, the learner selects an action and observes only the loss incurred at that action. The loss consists of an underlying convex and $\beta$-smooth component and an adversarial perturbation that may be chosen after observing the learner's action. The perturbations are subject to a global budget controlling their cumulative magnitude over time. This framework extends the globally budgeted, post-action perturbation model from underly…
items.why_zh: 该研究扩展了对抗性赌博机优化理论，考虑了非凸损失和全局预算扰动，更贴近实际场景。
items.why_en: This work extends adversarial bandit optimization to non-convex losses with globally budgeted perturbations, more realistic for practical applications.

items.why_en: This series demonstrates Doubao's continuous iteration in AI foundation models, offering tailored solutions for different scenarios.

items.title_zh: 刚注册就成独角兽，具身创企昆仑行90天融资数十亿元｜36氪独家
items.title_en: Former Alibaba Cloud Exec Ren Geng Founds Kunlunxing Robot, Raises Billions in 90 Days to Become Embodied AI Unicorn
items.summary_zh: 离开阿里云一年多以后，前阿里集团副总裁、阿里云中国区总裁任庚，以昆仑行创始人的身份，再次切入AI的战场。这次他锚定的领域，是AI的落地终端——机器人。 36氪获悉，昆仑行机器人注册不到90天，已接连完成了3轮融资，累计融资规模为数十亿元。3轮融资后，公司估值已超十亿美元，成为具身行业独角兽。 这样的节奏显然刷新了具身智能行业的独角兽速度。 公司此前发布的信息显示，昆仑行机器人“对标特斯拉人形机器人这一行业标杆”，“坚持‘本体+大脑’双轮驱动战略”。前理想辅助驾驶一号位郎咸朋，是昆仑行的联合创始人。 一家接触过昆仑行的头部资本判断，任庚的重心，会更多地落在战略方向，组织体系搭建，商业运作、企业整体运营等，郎咸朋则主要负责AI技术的研发与落地。 这样的创业组合，让昆仑行饱受资本追捧。其首轮融资在企业注册不到3天时，便被顶级投资机构哄抢份额。有行业人士评价：“在这具身赛道内是较为罕见的。” 目前，昆仑行的股东有高瓴资本、高榕创投、钟鼎资本、中科创星、华业资本、创新工场、心资本等国内头部创投机构，还有巨型产业集团建发集团旗下的产业资本。而且，首轮进场的所有投资人，包括高瓴资本、高榕创投、中科创星、华业资本等顶级创投，连续3轮加码跟投昆仑行。 有接近昆仑行的行业人士甚至告诉36氪： “其实公司还没有注册完成时，估值便已跻身独角兽。” 36氪从不少投资机构处了解到，任庚和郎咸朋组合之所以倍受关…
items.summary_en: Former Alibaba Cloud president Ren Geng founded Kunlunxing Robot, which raised billions of yuan in three rounds within 90 days, becoming an embodied AI unicorn. Co-founder Lang Xianpeng, ex-ideal Auto ADAS head, leads AI R&D. The company targets Tesla-like humanoid robots.
items.why_zh: 昆仑行以惊人速度成为独角兽，凸显具身智能赛道的资本热度与顶级人才组合的吸引力。
items.why_en: Kunlunxing's rapid unicorn status highlights the capital frenzy in embodied AI and the appeal of top-tier talent combinations.

items.why_zh: 智谱股价大幅波动，凸显AI概念股的高风险与市场情绪变化。
items.why_en: Zhipu's sharp price swing highlights the high volatility and shifting sentiment in AI stocks.

items.title_zh: 豆包大模型日均 tokens 调用量达 180 万亿，字节跳动 CEO 梁汝波称聚焦提升大模型能力
items.title_en: Doubao Model Reaches 180 Trillion Daily Tokens; ByteDance CEO Says Focus on Improving Model Capabilities
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，据《科创板日报》今日报道，在 2026 火山引擎 force 原动力大会上，火山引擎总裁谭待表示，截至 2026 年 6 月， 豆包大模型日均 tokens 调用量达 180 万亿 ，较发布时增长超 1500 倍，过去一年增长超 10 倍。 此外，字节跳动 CEO 梁汝波在火山引擎 Force 大会上表示，字节跳动年度关键词定为“勇攀高峰”， 核心是聚焦提升大模型能力 ，火山引擎 PaaS 业务已转为公司基础业务，对 MaaS 业务投入长期坚定。此外，视频生成模型 Seedance 新版本将发布 3D 白模预演功能，系业内率先提供该能力。 IT之家注意到，此前有报道显示，截至上半年， 每天 2 亿多人使用的豆包应用每天收入不足百万元 ，主要来自电商佣金。而到今年 5 月，参照火山引擎公开 API 价格，结合豆包大模型的毛利率及豆包用户使用习惯，在不算为训练豆包模型搭建的算力中心成本下，报道推算豆包每天日消耗的算力成本达数千万元。 据悉，两个月前有字节高层到访 Anthropic，回来不久字节开始调整 AI 资源分配， 重心从豆包这类面向大众的产品，转向服务企业的产品 。 而字节 Seedance 已证明企业服务的方向可行。消息称目前 Seedance 年化收入（ARR）已达 20 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 135.74 亿元人民币），单月超 1…
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Volcano Engine Force Conference, it was announced that Doubao model's daily token usage hit 180 trillion, up over 1500x from launch. ByteDance CEO Liang Rubo emphasized focusing on improving model capabilities. The company shifted AI resources from consumer products to enterprise services, with Seedance reaching $2B ARR.
items.why_zh: 豆包调用量激增与战略转向企业服务，显示字节跳动AI商业化路径的重大调整。
items.why_en: Doubao's surging usage and strategic pivot to enterprise services signal a major shift in ByteDance's AI monetization.

items.title_zh: 硬氪首发 | 快手系AI芯片公司再融资数亿，销量近十万颗，视频压缩性能超英伟达
items.title_en: Kuaishou-backed AI Chip Company Lingchuan Tech Raises Hundreds of Millions in Series A+ Round, Video Compression Outperforms NVIDIA
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 林晴晴 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，人工智能芯片公司「凌川科技」近日完成数亿元A+轮融资，本轮由啟赋资本领投，产业投资方新国都、知名投资机构金浦投资、朝晖资本、BV百度风投、水木投资集团、亦庄科创二期基金（北京科创亦庄直投基金），以及全球知名家办等参与投资，老股东顺禧基金、九智资本持续追加投资。项目落地北京亦庄，获亦庄国投重点支持，本轮融资将主要用于下一代芯片研发、现有产品SL200的量产扩产及海外市场拓展。 「凌川科技」成立于2024年3月，由北京市人工智能基金与快手集团共同发起设立，前身为快手集团的异构计算与芯片事业部，是一家以硬件为基础的软件公司，专注于智能视频与生成式视频等多模态大模型的底层算力。公司创始人、董事长兼CEO刘凌志为上海交大博���、华盛顿大学博士后，曾任快手集团副总裁及华为、英特尔等核心技术管理岗，于2018年起从零到一搭建了快手异构计算和芯片团队。团队在快手内部自研的SL200芯片智能视频SOC芯片，持续在快手部署数万颗、稳定服务7亿用户，公司于2024年3月正式拆分独立运营。 短视频、直播、AIGV（AI Generated Video）等应用的爆发，让视频数据的处理和传输需求急剧增长。无论是互联网数据中心的视频转码，还是智慧城市、智能制造、边缘计算等场景中的实时视频分析，都对底层算力的编解码效率、功耗和成本提出了更高要求。在这一趋势下，AIG…
items.summary_en: Lingchuan Technology, an AI chip company spun off from Kuaishou, has raised hundreds of millions of yuan in Series A+ funding. Its SL200 chip, deployed in Kuaishou's infrastructure, offers video compression performance surpassing NVIDIA's. The funds will be used for next-gen chip development and global expansion.
items.why_zh: 凌川科技的视频压缩性能超越英伟达，表明国产AI芯片在特定领域已具备国际竞争力，对AI视频处理产业链意义重大。
items.why_en: Lingchuan's video compression outperforming NVIDIA indicates that domestic AI chips are becoming globally competitive in specific domains, which is significant for the AI video processing industry.

items.title_zh: “正行创新”完成近亿美元天使轮融资
items.title_en: Striding AI Closes Nearly $100M Angel Round, Focuses on Embodied Intelligence
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，6月23日，“正行创新”（Striding AI）已完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资。投资方包括正大集团、华勤技术、九安医疗等多家上市企业，多位国内外知名企业家，以及多家一线投资机构。本轮募集的资金将主要投入三大方向：一是持续引进全球顶尖算法、工程与商业化人才，完善全链条人才梯队布局；二是加大世界动作模型、强化学习等核心技术的迭代与应用，夯实具身智能基础设施能力；三是加速零售、工业等场景的落地验证与产品化落地。
items.summary_en: Striding AI, an embodied intelligence company, has raised nearly $100 million in angel round funding from listed companies and investors. The funds will be used for talent acquisition, core technology iteration, and commercialization in retail and industrial scenarios.
items.why_zh: 近亿美元天使轮融资显示具身智能赛道正获得资本青睐，正行创新有望成为该领域的领军企业。
items.why_en: The nearly $100 million angel round indicates strong investor interest in embodied intelligence, positioning Striding AI as a potential leader in the field.

items.title_zh: 索尼新策略曝光：为保利润缩减 PS5 出货量，短期难有降价促销
items.title_en: Sony Cuts PS5 Shipments to Protect Profits, No Price Cuts Expected Soon
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，这一代游戏主机的发展之路多少有些坎坷。主机发售恰逢疫情时期，全球供应链受阻，芯片、配件大规模缺货。如今受人工智能产业爆发的影响，内存价格暴涨，进一步推高了主机整体售价。 索尼自然也未能幸免，今年早些时候该公司就已上调了 PS5 的售价。一份新曝光的内部文件显示，索尼打算通过缩减 PS5 出货量来缓解当前的成本压力。 一份外泄的商业文件披露，索尼认为，想要控制 PS5 不断上涨的成本、改善盈利，只能减少出货量，同时取消各类促销活动。因此，短期内大家很难再买到降价优惠的 PS5 主机。 IT之家注意到，往年节假日期间，游戏主机都会推出力度可观的促销活动，但今年这类优惠大概率不会出现。内存涨价抬升了生产成本，索尼如今也接受主机销量下滑的现状。 这份报告最关键的信息是：减少主机出货量反而能提升利润。这也侧面说明硬件成本已经高到离谱，索尼每生产一台 PS5 都大概率处于亏损状态。 即便如此，《GTA6》上线时，这一代主机或许能迎来一波销量回暖。该作首发将为主机独占，势必带动主机销量上涨。但内存紧缺、高价的局面预计会持续到 2027 年，热度过后主机销量仍会再度回落。
items.summary_en: Leaked documents reveal Sony plans to reduce PS5 shipments and cancel promotions to mitigate rising costs from memory price hikes driven by AI demand. The company expects lower shipments to improve profitability, with no price cuts in the near term.
items.why_zh: 索尼缩减PS5出货量反映了AI产业对硬件成本的连锁影响，游戏主机行业正面临供应链和成本双重挑战。
items.why_en: Sony's shipment reduction highlights the cascading impact of AI on hardware costs, posing challenges for the gaming console industry.

items.title_zh: 字节豆包Seed 2.1 Pro和Turbo模型发布，三大能力全面提升
items.title_en: ByteDance's Doubao Seed 2.1 Pro and Turbo Models Released with Three Major Upgrades
items.summary_zh: 字节豆包Seed 2.1 Pro和Turbo模型发布，三大能力全面提升 搜狐网
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Volcano Engine has launched the Doubao Seed 2.1 series, featuring Pro and Turbo models with upgrades in coding, agent task execution, and multimodal understanding. The release strengthens ByteDance's position in the AI large model landscape.

items.why_en: The release of the Doubao Seed 2.1 series demonstrates ByteDance's continuous breakthroughs in coding and agent AI capabilities, setting a benchmark for the industry.

items.title_zh: 字节豆包 Seed 2.1 Pro 和 Turbo 深度思考模型发布，三大能力比肩 GPT-5.5
items.title_en: ByteDance's Doubao Seed 2.1 Pro and Turbo Deep Thinking Models Released, Rivaling GPT-5.5 in Three Capabilities
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，据IT之家小伙伴反馈，字节跳动悄悄在火山引擎官网上线了 豆包 Seed 2.1 系列模型 ，包括 Pro 和 Turbo 版本，Seed-Evolving 模型也进行了迭代。 根据官方介绍，Doubao-Seed-2.1 是面向 Coding 和 Agent 时代打造的新一代大模型，提供 Pro 和 Turbo 两个版本， 分别面向高复杂度任务探索和规模化生产场景 。相较上一代版本，Seed 2.1 在 Coding 工程交付、Agent 长链路任务执行和多模态理解三大方向上实现全面升级，以更强的自主规划与动态修复能力，胜任真实研发与高价值生产任务。 ▲ Coding 能力测试 ▲ Agent 能力测试 ▲ VLM 能力测试 IT之家查询火山引擎官方文档获悉： doubao-seed-2-1-pro-260628 是一个深度思考模型， 官方宣称是面向 Coding 与 Agent 时代打造的新一代旗舰模型 ，在 Coding 工程交付、Agent 长链路任务执行与多模态理解三大方向全面升级，具备更强的需求理解、长期规划与持续修复能力。适用于复杂 Coding、长链路 Agent、多步骤工程交付等高复杂度任务探索及高价值生产场景。 doubao-seed-2-1-turbo-260628 是一个深度思考模型，官方宣称面向规模化生产场景的低成本、低时延版…
items.summary_en: ByteDance has released the Doubao Seed 2.1 deep thinking models, claiming they rival GPT-5.5 in coding, agent tasks, and multimodal understanding. The Pro version targets complex tasks, while Turbo focuses on cost-effective production.
items.why_zh: 豆包Seed 2.1模型宣称比肩GPT-5.5，表明国产大模型在核心能力上已接近国际顶尖水平，对AI产业格局有重要影响。
items.why_en: The claim that Doubao Seed 2.1 rivals GPT-5.5 indicates that domestic large models are approaching global top-tier capabilities, significantly impacting the AI industry landscape.

items.title_zh: Groq 与英伟达交易后转型 AI 推理 CSP，完成新一轮 6.5 亿美元融资
items.title_en: Groq Raises $650M, Transitions to AI Inference CSP
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，AI 初创企业 Groq 在去年底与 NVIDIA（英伟达）签署了一份非独家授权协议，以 200 亿美元的总价向这家巨头授权 LPU 推理技术，部分团队人员也加入英伟达。 而在约六个月后的美国加州当地时间 2026 年 6 月 22 日，Groq 宣布完成新一轮 6.5 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 44.11 亿元人民币）融资，该企业也将转型为 AI 推理 CSP（云服务供应商）。 Groq 表示 其优势在于拥有世界唯一具备大规模 LPU 实际操作经验的工程团队 。该企业目前在北美、欧洲、中东、亚太运营 13 座数据中心，为超过 500 万开发者和数千家 AI 原生企业提供服务，词元 (Token) 周消耗量以万亿计。 Groq 的下一步是扩大 AI 推理基础设施规模，部署其最新推理技术和 NVIDIA LPX 系统， 目标到 2027 年底拥有 200MW 算力资源 。
items.summary_en: AI startup Groq completed a $650M funding round on June 22, 2026, and announced its transition to an AI inference cloud service provider. The company previously signed a $20B non-exclusive licensing deal with Nvidia for its LPU technology. Groq operates 13 data centers globally and aims to reach 200MW of compute capacity by 2027.
items.why_zh: Groq的转型和融资标志着AI推理领域竞争加剧，其LPU技术可能改变云服务格局。
items.why_en: Groq's pivot to AI inference CSP and its $650M raise highlight the intensifying competition in AI inference, with its LPU technology potentially reshaping cloud services.
